# Checkbox

Toggles a binary option in a form or settings surface.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/checkbox
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="checkbox" example={0} code={`<Checkbox label="Accept terms" />`} />

```tsx
<Checkbox label="Accept terms" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="checkbox"
  example={1}
  code={`<Checkbox description="Receive product release notes." id="release-notes" label="Release notes" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Checkbox description="Receive product release notes." id="release-notes" label="Release notes" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="checkbox"
  example={2}
  code={`<Checkbox invalid label="Required checkbox" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Checkbox invalid label="Required checkbox" />
```

## Props

| Prop          | Type           | Required | Default | Description |
| ------------- | -------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `description` | `ReactNode`    | No       | -       | -           |
| `invalid`     | `boolean`      | No       | -       | -           |
| `label`       | `ReactNode`    | No       | -       | -           |
| `size`        | `CheckboxSize` | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant   | Values           |
| --------- | ---------------- |
| `invalid` | `true`           |
| `size`    | `sm`, `md`, `lg` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/checkbox.json`
- Recipe: `checkbox`
- Files: `src/components/ui/checkbox.tsx`
